chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. Transfer Application No.53 of 2025 (The State through PG Sindh Vs. Rehman Ahmed & another) Cr. Transfer Application No.54 of 2025 (The State through PG Sindh Vs. Syed Raza Ali alias Soldier) --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For hearing of main case 2. For orders on MA No.7334/2025 10.06.2025 Mr. Zahoor Shah, Addl: PG Sindh and Rana Khalid Hussain, Sr. Spl. Prosecutor Rangers (Sindh) ----- Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro, J:- Despite service, respondents, who are confined in jail, are called absent, nor any advocate has put up appearance on their behalf. These transfer applications have been filed in order to avoid conflicting judgments in the connected cases, which are pending before different Courts. The main Case No.34/2020, arising out of FIR No.37/2019, registered at Police Station New Karachi is pending before ATC Court No.19, whereas, the off-shot Cases No.236, 236-A, 236-B and 236-C, arising out of FIR Nos.51 to 54 of 2019, and Cases No.237, 237-A, 237-B, 237-C, 237-D, 237-E and 237-F of 20219, arising out of FIR Nos.55 to 61 of 2019 at Police Station Gadap City, Karachi, are pending before the ATC Court No.5, Karachi. Therefore, on the above ground, the off-shot cases, detailed above are hereby withdrawn from the file of ATC Court No.5 and are transferred to ATC Court No.19 for disposal in accordance with law. These Criminal Transfer Application are disposed of in above terms. Office to place a copy of this order in connected matter.
These Criminal Transfer Application are disposed of in above terms. Office to place a copy of this order in connected matter. JUDGE Rafiq/P.A
